2605.30311.title: Archon: A Unified Multimodal Model for Holistic Digital Human Generation
2605.30311.paper_summary: Digital humans are fundamental to immersive interaction, yet creating a unified model for holistic modalities, including text, audio, motion, and visual content, remains an open challenge. In this paper, we present Archon, a fully pretrained, human-centric unified multimodal model for holistic avatar generation. Archon unifies seven modalities with modality-specific tokenizers, and a native autoregressive unified multimodal model pretrained on synchronized modalities and 72 diverse tasks to model holistic joint distributions. To address the token explosion challenge in high-fidelity talking videos, we introduce a memory-efficient semantic video reparameterization, achieving 4x token reduction while preserving fine-grained dynamics, coupled with a semantic-driven video diffusion decoder. We further propose a "Thinking in Modality" that decomposes ambiguous cross-modal tasks into stepwise thinking in an alternative chain of modality, progressively enhancing fidelity and controllability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Archon achieves superior or comparable performance across diverse digital human generation tasks, validating the effectiveness of our unified framework. Project page: https://zju3dv.github.io/archon/.
2605.30311.paper_summary_zh: 數位人類對於沉浸式互動至關重要，但創建一個統一的模型以涵蓋文本、音頻、運動和視覺內容等整體模態仍然是一個未解的挑戰。在本文中，我們提出了Archon，一個完全預訓練的人本統一多模態模型，用於整體虛擬角色生成。Archon整合了七種模態，並使用模態特定的標記器，以及一個在同步模態和72個多樣任務上預訓練的原生自回歸統一多模態模型，以建模整體聯合分佈。為了解決高保真度對話視頻中的標記爆炸挑戰，我們引入了一種內存高效的語義視頻重參數化技術，實現了4倍的標記減少，同時保留了細緻的動態，並結合了一個以語義驅動的視頻擴散解碼器。我們進一步提出了一種「以模態思考」的方法，將模糊的跨模態任務分解為在替代模態鏈中的逐步思考，逐步提高保真度和可控性。大量實驗表明，Archon在各種數位人類生成任務中達到了優越或可比的性能，驗證了我們統一框架的有效性。項目頁面：https://zju3dv.github.io/archon/.
2605.30311.author: Chong Bao et.al.
2605.30311.authors: Chong Bao, Shichen Liu, Lijun Yu, David Futschik, Stylianos Moschoglou, Shefali Srivastava, Ziqian Bai, Feitong Tan, Guofeng Zhang, Zhaopeng Cui, Sean Fanello, Yinda Zhang
